metrics: Dropout rate reduced 40%, 12 classrooms built, 150 teachers trained, 2400 learning kits distributed
challenge: Lack of access to quality education in Dharavi slums
solution: Mobile learning centers and digital labs established in community spaces
human_story: Meera, 10, was the first girl in her family to attend school. Today she stands first in her class and dreams of becoming a doctor.

metrics: 22000 consultations, Rs 1.2 crore free medicines, 3400 screenings, 200 CHWs trained
challenge: Healthcare inaccessibility in urban slums and rural periphery
solution: Mobile health clinics bringing primary care directly to communities
human_story: Ramesh, 73, hadn't seen a doctor in 11 years before Chandni arrived. Today he manages his diabetes with dignity.

metrics: 40% increase in crop yield, 12 solar pumps installed, 3 women cooperatives formed, Rs 45 lakh additional income
challenge: Climate-driven water scarcity threatening traditional farming livelihoods
solution: Drip irrigation systems and solar water pumps combined with cooperative farming models
human_story: Savita Devi, 42, nearly abandoned her 2-acre plot. Today she leads a 28-member women's cooperative and exports organic produce.

metrics: 92% board pass rate vs state avg 61%, 45 students in engineering colleges, 12 scholarships secured
challenge: First-generation learners lack academic support and career guidance
column10: Raju, 17, the son of a daily wage laborer, scored 94% in boards. He starts at IIT Patna this September.

beneficiary: 2200 urban poor families in 8 slum clusters
metrics: 1800 women trained in digital skills, 340 micro-enterprises launched, Rs 2.1 crore revenue generated
challenge: Unemployment and digital exclusion among urban poor communities
solution: Digital literacy programs combined with microfinance and market linkage support
human_story: Lakshmi started a home-based tailoring unit with Rs 15000 loan. Her monthly income tripled in 6 months.
